selection_rule: Single primary category with hierarchical subcategories
field_description: Identifies what a product fundamentally is. Gift presentation, retail availability, travel suitability, and aftercare use are Product Use Contexts rather than Product Categories.

field_option.option_description: Oil, lotion, cream, gel, powder, or comparable medium used during massage.
Essential oil, fragrance blend, diffuser, inhalation item, or related aromatic product.
Balm, liniment, rub, patch, topical oil, cream, or similar comfort product.
Scrub, polish, mask, wrap product, moisturizer, cleanser, or related body-care item.
Towel, sheet, blanket, robe, wrap, cover, or other treatment textile.
Roller, massage ball, gua sha tool, scraping tool, or other non-powered implement.
Massage table, chair, bed, stool, trolley, or treatment-room furniture.
Electrical or battery-powered massage device used manually or independently.
Heater, warmer, cold-recovery device, compression system, or related recovery equipment.
Water-treatment, aquatic, whirlpool, Vichy, or hydrotherapy equipment.
Bowl, dispenser, storage, laundry, presentation, preparation, or routine operational item.
Cleaning, disinfection, sanitation, protective, or personal-hygiene product.
Single-use cover, applicator, garment, liner, wipe, or treatment consumable.
Clothing, footwear, apron, protective wear, or professional garment.
Lighting, scent, sound, decorative, comfort, or sensory-environment product.
Room fixture, organizer, signage, locker, privacy accessory, or facility-support product.
Book, chart, model, video, practice item, lesson, or assessment material.
Software, downloadable template, digital form, application, or other non-physical product.

field_description: Physical form of a massage medium product. Balms, liniments, rubs, patches, and comparable concentrated topical preparations remain under TP - Topical Care Product.

field_option.option_description: Liquid oil formulation intended for massage glide or topical application.
Emulsion-style lotion intended for massage glide or skin application.
Thicker cream formulation intended for massage or targeted application.
Gel formulation intended for glide, cooling, warming, conductivity, or targeted use.
Powder formulation used for glide, moisture control, or a traditional method.

selection_rule: Multi-select where a formulation combines bases
field_description: Principal base class of a massage oil. Specific ingredients such as coconut, sweet almond, grapeseed, jojoba, sesame, sunflower, olive, rice bran, and comparable oils belong to structured ingredient records rather than this short base classification. Fragrance, essential-oil blends, warming agents, cooling agents, CBD, magnesium, preservatives, allergens, and claims remain separate product data.

field_option.option_description: Uses one or more non-volatile plant-derived carrier oils as a principal base.
Uses mineral oil as a principal base.
Uses synthetic, semi-synthetic, ester, silicone, or comparable formulated emollient ingredients as a principal base.
Materially combines more than one base class.

selection_rule: Single primary type with optional secondary relationships
field_description: Type of a non-powered massage tool. Material, dimensions, texture, shape, weight, temperature tolerance, sanitation method, and intended body area remain category-specific specifications.

field_option.option_description: Stone used manually for pressure, glide, placement, thermal application, or massage.
Bamboo implement used for rolling, compression, tapping, glide, or massage manipulation.
Wooden implement used for pressure, rolling, contouring, or massage manipulation.
Cylindrical, wheel-based, textured, or comparable rolling tool.
Ball-shaped tool used for pressure, release, rolling, or self-care.
Smooth-edged tool associated with gua sha or related scraping and gliding practices.
Tool principally designed for scraping or instrument-assisted soft-tissue work.
Manual cup used for suction-based massage, cupping, glide, or localized application.
Compress bundle containing herbs or another preparation and applied manually.
Rod, stick, cane, or comparable elongated manual massage tool.
Manual implement designed for focused point pressure.
Non-powered handheld implement that does not fit a more specific tool type.

field_description: Type of treatment furniture. A standard household bed may be used operationally during a service, but it does not require its own Massage Nexus treatment-furniture product type unless an actual listed product is relevant.

field_option.option_description: Purpose-built table intended for massage or bodywork.
Purpose-built treatment bed or padded treatment platform.
Purpose-built chair for seated massage or treatment.
Stool used by a practitioner during treatment.
Mobile trolley used to hold treatment products, tools, or supplies.
Purpose-built padded mat used as treatment support.
Reclining chair intended for treatment or supported wellness service.

field_description: Type of a powered massage device. Power source, motor type, speed, force, attachments, electrical rating, battery, sanitation, and safety remain category-specific specifications.

field_option.option_description: Powered device delivering rapid percussive movement.
Powered device delivering vibration or oscillation.
Powered massager designed to be held or guided by a user or practitioner.
Powered chair providing automated or semi-automated massage.
Powered bed or platform providing automated or semi-automated massage.
Powered device principally designed for the feet.
Powered device principally designed for the legs.
Powered device principally designed for the neck or shoulders.

field_description: Type of thermal or recovery equipment.

field_option.option_description: Equipment used to heat massage stones.
Equipment used to warm towels or linens.
Equipment used to warm massage oil or another treatment medium.
Reusable powered or non-powered pad designed to apply heat.
Equipment designed for localized or whole-body cold exposure or recovery.
Powered or mechanical compression equipment used for recovery or wellness.
Equipment using infrared radiant heat.
Equipment designed for controlled cryotherapy or very-low-temperature exposure.

field_description: Type of hydrotherapy equipment. Capacity, dimensions, water pressure, temperature range, filtration, sanitation, power, and installation remain category-specific specifications.

field_option.option_description: Multi-head overhead shower equipment used during wet treatment.
Whirlpool bath or equipment producing circulating water.
Purpose-built bath used for hydrotherapy treatment.
Equipment delivering controlled pressurized water jets.
Float, buoyancy aid, aquatic cradle, or comparable support used in water.
Equipment that applies water-driven pressure without direct client water contact.
Equipment supporting guided movement, stabilization, or positioning in water.

field_description: Type of a treatment textile or linen. Fiber composition, weave, dimensions, weight, absorbency, softness, color, care, reusability, and sanitation remain category-specific specifications. Disposable drapes, covers, garments, and liners belong primarily to DS - Disposable Treatment Supply.

field_option.option_description: Absorbent textile used for drying, draping, treatment, or facility operation.
Flat sheet used for treatment support, coverage, or draping.
Fitted sheet designed for a treatment table, bed, or comparable support.
Textile used for warmth, comfort, coverage, or draping.
Garment provided for client coverage or facility use.
Wrap garment or textile used for changing, coverage, treatment, or draping.
Removable cover for a pillow, bolster, face cradle, or support.
Protective or decorative cover used on a treatment table.
Reusable textile specifically intended for professional draping.

field_label: Body and Skin Care Product Type
field_description: Type of a body or skin care product. Exact ingredients, concentration, formula, allergens, warnings, storage, preparation, and use instructions remain product-specific data.

field_option.option_description: Product formulated for body or skin exfoliation.
Product formulated to smooth or refine the skin surface.
Product applied as a treatment layer for a defined period.
Product formulated or prepared for body wrapping.
Mud-based body or skin treatment product.
Clay-based body or skin treatment product.
Product formulated to cleanse the skin.
Product formulated to hydrate or support skin comfort.
Herbal, mineral, gel, or another preparation intended for a compress.
Algae-based body or skin treatment product.
Seaweed-based body or skin treatment product.

field_description: Compares a product only with direct peers in the same category. Product Grade is assigned or confirmed by Massage Nexus and is not freely selected by a seller. Price alone does not determine Product Grade.

field_option.option_description: Exceptional materials, formulation, construction, reliability, performance, presentation, or professional suitability within its category.
Clearly above ordinary category standards in quality, durability, function, formulation, or professional suitability.
Dependable mainstream product meeting normal usability and quality expectations for its category.
Lower-cost product providing acceptable function with simpler materials, features, formulation, durability, or presentation.
Entry-level or minimal product providing only essential function within its category.

classification_note: Compare only direct peers; disposable, reusable, digital, textile, topical, and equipment products are not graded by one identical checklist.
Use category-relevant evidence such as materials, formulation, construction, durability, safety, performance, warranty, professional suitability, and presentation.
A lower-grade product may receive an excellent review for value and performance.
A premium-grade product may receive a poor review when it fails premium expectations.
Seller claims and price may support review but cannot assign the grade by themselves.

field_description: Contexts in which the product is used.

field_option.option_description: Used by a spa during treatment, facility operation, or client care.
Used by an individual therapist in professional or portable practice.
Used by a consumer for personal or household wellness care.
Used after treatment or between sessions for follow-through or comfort.
Used for teaching, study, practice, demonstration, or assessment.
Used to furnish, equip, organize, or prepare a treatment facility.
Used for cleaning, sanitation, infection control, or protective handling.
Used to influence scent, light, sound, comfort, or atmosphere.
Intended for direct sale to customers.
Intended for gifting, recognition, souvenir, or promotional presentation.
Intended for portable, compact, mobile, hotel, event, or field use.

field_description: General product characteristics. Detailed material, formula, dimension, texture, power, and performance characteristics remain category-specific specifications.

field_option.option_description: Intentionally produces or contains a noticeable scent.
Generates, stores, applies, or relies on heat during intended use.
Requires mains electricity or powered electrical components.
Operates through replaceable or rechargeable batteries.
Intended to be used once and then discarded.
Designed for repeated use and may require cleaning, maintenance, or replacement parts.

field_description: Declared product claims. A claim is not automatically verified. Preserve the claimant, certifier, standard, jurisdiction, evidence, and verification result separately.

field_option.option_description: Declared free from animal-derived ingredients or materials.
Declared not tested on animals under the stated claim framework.
Declared or certified organic under an identified standard.
Declared to have undergone dermatological testing.
Declared as formulated or designed to reduce allergy risk.

field_description: Common spa-product allergen and sensitivity groups. The list does not replace complete ingredient and material records. Absence of an allergen classification does not mean allergen-free.

field_option.option_description: Contains or may expose the user to peanut-derived material.
Contains or may expose the user to tree-nut-derived material.
Contains or may expose the user to coconut-derived material.
Contains or may expose the user to soy-derived material.
Contains or may expose the user to wheat-derived material.
Contains or may expose the user to milk-derived material.
Contains or may expose the user to egg-derived material.
Contains or may expose the user to shellfish-derived material.
Contains beeswax, honey, propolis, royal jelly, or another bee-derived material.
Contains or may expose the user to natural or synthetic latex.
Contains fragrance compounds associated with sensitivity concerns.
Contains one or more essential oils requiring specific ingredient identification.

field_description: Product warnings. Warnings preserve manufacturer, regulator, editorial, and verified safety sources separately.

field_option.option_description: May irritate skin through sensitivity, strength, concentration, or prolonged contact.
May increase sensitivity to sunlight or ultraviolet exposure.
May cause burns, overheating, or unsafe temperature exposure.
Requires electrical, charging, wiring, or moisture-safety precautions.
Requires controlled storage and use away from ignition sources.
May require avoidance, adaptation, or professional guidance during pregnancy.
May be unsuitable for particular conditions, medications, injuries, or implanted devices.
Requires trained operation or application because of strength, complexity, or risk.
Requires cleaning, disinfection, sterilization, or controlled reuse.

field_description: Market and lifecycle status of a product identity.

field_option.option_description: Presently produced, sold, or recognized as the active version.
No longer produced or normally offered by the responsible manufacturer or publisher.
Formally withdrawn because of safety, quality, regulatory, or manufacturing concerns.
Current market or lifecycle status cannot be confirmed.

selection_rule: One relationship type per connected product-version pair
field_description: Relationship between connected product versions. A product may have several relationships; Previous is therefore derived from its connection to a later version rather than stored as a competing lifecycle status.

field_option.option_description: The source version replaces the connected earlier version.
Formula, ingredients, materials, function, or performance changed substantially.
Packaging, container, label, quantity presentation, or external presentation changed.
Product continues under a different name, brand, or model designation.
The source version has been replaced by the connected later version.

field_description: Authenticity status is separate from lifecycle, version, moderation, review rating, and seller conduct.

field_option.option_description: Authenticity has been confirmed through accepted evidence.
Authenticity has not been confirmed.
Available evidence creates a credible counterfeit concern.
Product has been confirmed as counterfeit or unauthorized.

field_description: Moderation status of the product record.

field_option.option_description: No current moderation restriction prevents normal platform use.
Product record is being reviewed for policy, safety, authenticity, identity, or evidence concerns.
Visibility, interaction, recommendation, or commercial use is limited.
Product record is removed from normal platform use under moderation policy.
